CONTENT.Club career: Tahirović started playing football at his hometown club AIK, before joining the youth setup of FC Djursholm in 2017. In 2020, he switched to Vasalunds IF. He made his professional debut against IFK Berga on 14 June 2020 at the age of 17.In February 2021, Tahirović moved to Italian side Roma on a contract until June 2026. He made his official debut for the team against Torino on 13 November 2022.In June 2023, Tahirović was transferred to Dutch outfit Ajax for an undisclosed fee. He made his competitive debut for the squad on 12 August against Heracles. On 12 November, he scored his first professional goal against Almere City.

CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 19 May 2024As of match played 9 June 2024
CONTENT.International career: In March 2023, Tahirović received his first senior call-up to Bosnia and Herzegovina, for UEFA Euro 2024 qualifiers against Iceland and Slovakia. He debuted against the former on 23 March.

SUMMARY:
Benjamin Tahirović (pronounced [běɲamin tâːxiroʋitɕ]; born 3 March 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Eredivisie club Ajax. Born in Sweden, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Tahirović started his professional career at Vasalunds IF, before joining Roma in 2021. Two years later, he moved to Ajax.
Tahirović made his senior international debut for Bosnia and Herzegovina in 2023.
